en.title: Best Portable Chargers 2026
en.description: Anker Prime 250W, Anker 737, UGREEN Nexode 200W, Baseus PicoGo Qi2.2, plus the rest of the power banks worth carrying in 2026, ranked by usable Wh, real PD 3.1 output, and how much friction the cable situation actually adds to your day.

zh-tw.title: 最佳行動電源 2026
zh-tw.description: Anker Prime 250W、Anker 737、UGREEN Nexode 200W、Baseus PicoGo Qi2.2，以及 2026 年值得帶出門的其他行動電源，這份排行用實際可用 Wh、真正的 PD 3.1 輸出、還有那條線到底會不會煩死你來排序。

en.description: 26,250mAh / 99.75Wh airline-legal laptop power bank with 300W combined PD 3.1 output across two 140W USB-C ports plus one USB-A, native support for Xiaomi 120W HyperCharge and Huawei 66W SuperCharge, 250W input recharge, and Anker app with locator alerts.

zh-tw.description: 26,250mAh / 99.75Wh 過得了航空安檢的筆電行動電源，兩個 140W USB-C 加一個 USB-A 合計 300W PD 3.1 輸出，原生支援小米 120W HyperCharge 和華為 66W SuperCharge，250W 輸入快速回充，Anker App 含遺失警報。

en.description: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh airline-legal laptop power bank with 250W combined PD 3.1 output across two USB-C ports plus one USB-A, color display, and full Anker app integration with smart charging and locator alerts.

zh-tw.description: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh 過得了航空安檢的筆電行動電源，兩個 USB-C 加一個 USB-A 合計 250W PD 3.1 輸出，彩色螢幕，完整支援 Anker App 智慧充電和遺失警報。

en.description: 24,000mAh GaNPrime power bank with 140W PD 3.1 output, dual USB-C plus USB-A, and a smart digital display showing live input/output and recharge time.

zh-tw.description: 24,000mAh GaNPrime 行動電源，140W PD 3.1 輸出，雙 USB-C 加一個 USB-A，智慧螢幕即時顯示輸入輸出功率和回充剩餘時間。

en.description: 25,000mAh / 90Wh power bank with two USB-C ports rated 140W and 100W, USB-A 18W, combined 200W PD 3.1 output, automotive-grade 21700 cells, 13-layer protection, and a TFT smart display.

zh-tw.description: 25,000mAh / 90Wh 行動電源，兩個 USB-C 分別最高 140W 和 100W，USB-A 18W，雙 USB-C 並用合計 200W PD 3.1 輸出，車規級 21700 鋰電芯，13 層保護機制，配備 TFT 智慧顯示螢幕。

competitors.name: Anker Nano Power Bank (10K, 30W, Built-in USB-C Cable)

en.description: 10,000mAh pocket power bank with built-in USB-C cable doubling as a strap, 30W PD output across the integrated cable, USB-C port, and USB-A port, with an 80% recycled-plastic body.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh 口袋行動電源，內建 USB-C 線兼當吊繩，30W PD 輸出可走內建線、USB-C 孔或 USB-A 孔，外殼 80% 後消費回收塑膠。

competitors.name: Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 Magnetic Power Bank (10K)

en.description: 10,000mAh Qi2.2 25W magnetic power bank with 45W USB-C built-in cable, alloy chassis at 16mm thick, triple-cooling system, and 30W input that fully recharges the unit in roughly 90 minutes.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh Qi2.2 25W 磁吸行動電源，內建 45W USB-C 線，鋁合金機身厚度 16mm，三重散熱系統，30W 輸入大約 90 分鐘可回充滿電。

en.description: 10,000mAh Qi2-certified 15W MagSafe-compatible power bank with 27W USB-C wired output, foldable kickstand, smart display, and ActiveShield temperature monitoring at 3 million checks per day.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh Qi2 認證 15W MagSafe 相容行動電源，有線 USB-C 輸出 27W，可折疊立架，智慧螢幕，ActiveShield 安全系統每天偵測溫度三百萬次。

competitors.name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Magnetic Power Bank (Qi2 15W)

en.description: 10,000mAh Qi2 15W magnetic power bank with integrated pop-up kickstand, 72% post-consumer recycled plastic shell, included 1m USB-C cable, two-year warranty plus a $2,500 connected equipment guarantee.

zh-tw.description: 10,000mAh Qi2 15W 磁吸行動電源，內建彈出式立架，72% 後消費回收塑膠外殼，附 1 公尺 USB-C 線，兩年保固再加 75,000 元台幣的連接裝置保險。

competitors.name: INIU 20,000mAh 45W Power Bank with Built-in USB-C Cable

en.description: 20,000mAh TinyCell power bank with integrated USB-C cable, 45W PD output, additional USB-C and USB-A ports for triple simultaneous charging, TSA-compliant for carry-on, plus a 3-year warranty.

zh-tw.description: 20,000mAh TinyCell 行動電源，內建 USB-C 線，45W PD 輸出，多一個 USB-C 和一個 USB-A 孔可三孔同時充，過得了航空托運安檢，附三年保固。

en.description: 25,000mAh laptop-class power bank with three USB-C PD ports, up to 100W single-port output and 120W combined, fabric-wrapped chassis, and Apple Find My integration for tracking.

zh-tw.description: 25,000mAh 筆電級行動電源，三個 USB-C PD 孔，單孔最高 100W、三孔合計 120W，布面外殼，整合 Apple Find My 可追蹤定位。

en.description: 26,800mAh / 96.48Wh power bank with four USB-C ports including two 100W and 60W PD outputs, OLED display, and firmware that updates over USB-C to keep up with new device protocols.

zh-tw.description: 26,800mAh / 96.48Wh 行動電源，四個 USB-C 孔，其中兩個分別支援 100W 和 60W PD 輸出，OLED 螢幕，韌體可透過 USB-C 更新跟上新裝置協議。

references.title: The best power banks and portable chargers for every device in 2026
The best portable chargers of 2026, tried and tested
The Best Power Banks of 2026
Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W Power Bank review
UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh Power Bank review
Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 batteries review
Best MagSafe portable battery pack 2026

en.commentary:
Buying a power bank in 2026 is a different shopping problem than it was even two years ago. PD 3.1 finally pushed the laptop-class category from 100W into 140W and 250W territory, USB-A ports stopped being a useful tiebreaker, and built-in USB-C cables turned from a convenience into the deciding feature for everyday carry. I ranked these the way I actually shop, by usable watt-hours first, real PD 3.1 output second, the cable situation third, and only then by sticker price.

Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W takes first because it is the only mainstream power bank that pushes a 16-inch MacBook Pro at the laptop's full 140W input while still leaving 110W for two phones charging simultaneously. The 99.56Wh rating is the maximum the FAA lets you carry on a plane. The Anker app integration is the most polished smart-charging software I have used, and the locator alert genuinely saves you when the brick falls behind a hotel bed. At $179.99 it costs more than the 737, but it is the right answer if you treat your power bank as the single device you cannot leave home without.

Anker 737 PowerCore 24K (140W) takes second and is the smarter purchase for almost everyone who does not need 250W. 24,000mAh of capacity, 140W PD 3.1 across the primary USB-C port, a smart display that shows real input and output wattage, and a $109.99 price that has held steady for two years. GaNPrime internals run measurably cooler than older PowerCore designs, which extends battery cycle life. The 737 is at two only because the Prime 250W has more headroom for laptops, otherwise this is the best capacity-per-dollar premium pick on the market.

UGREEN Nexode 25,000mAh 200W at three is the value champion of 2026. $99 buys you 25,000mAh / 90Wh, 140W single-port output, automotive-grade 21700 cells, and a TFT display that does almost everything Anker's app does without needing a phone connection. The 13-layer safety protection is real engineering, not marketing language. It loses to the Anker Prime only on app polish and to the 737 only on chassis size. If you are buying your first laptop-class power bank and Anker prices feel offensive, this is the answer.

Anker Nano Power Bank (10K, 30W) at four wins the everyday-carry category outright. The integrated USB-C cable doubles as the wrist strap, which is the most genuinely thoughtful piece of industrial design in any power bank under $50. 30W is enough to fast-charge an iPhone 17, an iPad mini, or a M-series MacBook Air at usable speed. 10,000mAh covers two full iPhone charges with margin. At $45 it is the power bank I tell every non-technical friend to buy and stop overthinking it.

Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 at five is the right pick for any iPhone 16 or 17 owner who actually charges wirelessly. 25W Qi2.2 is the new ceiling, double the old MagSafe limit, and the AM52 is one of the few power banks certified at this speed. The built-in 45W USB-C cable means you can charge an iPad Air at full speed while the iPhone sits magnetically on the back. 16mm thick is genuinely pocketable. The reason it sits at five rather than three is the 10,000mAh cap, you get one and a half iPhone charges before you need a wall.

Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 at six is the right answer for iPhone 12 through 15 owners who will not benefit from Qi2.2 25W. 15W Qi2 is still the iPhone 15 ceiling regardless of what power bank you buy, and the MagGo's foldable stand and 27W USB-C wired output cover the wired side better than the Belkin. ActiveShield monitoring is the genuine technical advance over the previous generation. At $71.99 it undercuts the Belkin by $28 and gives up almost nothing.

Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Qi2 at seven loses to the Anker MagGo on price and gains on industrial design. The pop-up kickstand is sturdier than Anker's, the 72% recycled chassis is the most environmentally serious build in the magnetic category, and the $2,500 connected equipment warranty is the only one I trust. Buy it if you want a kickstand-first design and the Belkin name carries weight in your IT department.

INIU 20,000mAh 45W with built-in cable at eight is the budget-tier answer that genuinely punches above its weight. $37 for 20,000mAh and 45W PD with an integrated USB-C cable is unprecedented pricing, and the TinyCell battery technology genuinely shrinks the chassis below comparable Anker units. The reason it is at eight rather than four is the brand support track record and the lack of any meaningful smart-charging app. If you treat power banks as disposable accessories that cost less than a dinner, this is the obvious purchase.

Mophie Powerstation Pro XL 25K (100W) at nine is the right answer for the Apple ecosystem buyer who values fabric finish, Find My integration, and the Apple Store premium experience. Three USB-C ports at 100W combined is real laptop-class output. The reason it is at nine rather than three is the $149.95 price for performance the UGREEN Nexode delivers at $99 with 200W output. Buy this if Find My on a power bank matters to you, otherwise the UGREEN is the rational choice.

Zendure SuperTank Pro 26,800mAh 100W at ten is the niche pick for the user who actually needs four USB-C ports simultaneously. Firmware updates over USB-C is a feature I have only seen Zendure ship at this price. At $199 in 2026 the value math no longer works because the Anker Prime 250W and UGREEN Nexode 200W both push more total wattage at lower prices. Buy the SuperTank Pro only if you genuinely need four USB-C devices charging from one brick, otherwise pick a competitor with two ports and more headroom.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W is the power bank I would buy in 2026 if I had to pick one
highlights.body: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh is the maximum FAA carry-on capacity, the 250W combined PD 3.1 output drives a 16-inch MacBook Pro at full 140W input while still leaving 110W for two phones, and the Anker app integration with locator alerts is the most polished smart-charging software in the category. The color display shows real input and output wattage, not the made-up percentages most banks display. At $179.99 it costs more than the 737 but solves a different problem: it is the only single device that handles a laptop, two phones, and a tablet from one airport bench.

highlights.title: PD 3.1 changed what a laptop-class power bank means and only three units have caught up
highlights.body: USB-C PD 3.1 lifted the per-port ceiling from 100W to 240W in late 2024, and the market took eighteen months to ship power banks that actually deliver above 140W. The Anker Prime 250W, Anker 737 140W, and UGREEN Nexode 200W are the three power banks I trust to fast-charge a 16-inch MacBook Pro at the laptop's full input rate. Anything labeled '100W max' in 2026 is a compromise the market no longer needs to make. If you are spending more than $80 on a power bank, the answer is one of these three or the math does not work out.

highlights.title: Built-in USB-C cables are the new minimum for everyday carry
highlights.body: The Anker Nano 10K, INIU 20,000mAh, and Baseus PicoGo all ship with integrated USB-C cables, and the daily-use difference compared to a separate cable is enormous. You eliminate the loose-cable failure mode where you forget the cable on the kitchen counter and end up with a brick of useless lithium in your bag. The integrated cable also doubles as a strap on the Anker Nano, which is the kind of genuinely thoughtful design that justifies brand premium. In 2026 a power bank without a built-in cable is asking you to carry two accessories where one would do.

highlights.title: Qi2.2 at 25W only matters for iPhone 16 and 17, every other iPhone caps at 15W Qi2
highlights.body: Apple gates wireless charging speed at the iPhone level, not the power bank level. iPhone 12 through 15 are hardware-capped at 15W regardless of what Qi2.2 power bank you connect. iPhone 16 and 17 are the only iPhones that benefit from the Baseus PicoGo AM52's 25W ceiling. If you have an iPhone 15 or older, the Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 at $71.99 gives you the same effective wireless charging speed as the $79.99 Baseus and saves you the upgrade cost. Match your power bank to your phone, not to the spec sheet.

highlights.title: Skip USB-A ports and 18,650 cells, both belong to the previous generation
highlights.body: Power banks built around 18,650 cylindrical cells are still everywhere on Amazon at $30 to $60, and they are slow to charge themselves, slow to charge your phone, and physically larger than 21700 or pouch-cell equivalents at the same Wh. USB-A ports survive on power banks for backwards compatibility with old cables, but every modern phone, laptop, tablet, and AirPods case takes USB-C. Buy a 2026 power bank with 21700 cells, USB-C-only output, and PD 3.1 support, or you are buying yesterday's product at this year's price. The only exception is if a free USB-A port lets you use the cable already in your bag, in which case the trade is fine for 18 months and then you upgrade.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年買行動電源跟兩年前已經是完全不同的事情了。PD 3.1 終於把筆電級行動電源從 100W 推到 140W、甚至 250W 的境界，USB-A 孔不再是判斷依據，內建 USB-C 線從附加便利變成日常隨身的決勝關鍵。這份排行我是用實際買的角度排的，先看可用瓦時數、再看真正的 PD 3.1 輸出、第三看那條線怎麼處理，最後才看標價。

Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W 排第一，因為它是市面上唯一一台真的能用 16 吋 MacBook Pro 滿載 140W 輸入快充、同時還能留 110W 給兩支手機一起充的主流行動電源。99.56Wh 剛好卡在美國 FAA 規定能上飛機的最高容量。Anker App 整合是這個品類最完整的智慧充電軟體，找電源警報這個功能在飯店床底找東西時真的會救你一命。台幣五千八雖然比 737 貴，但如果你把行動電源當成出門前唯一不能忘記的裝置，答案就是它。

Anker 737 PowerCore 24K（140W）排第二，是大多數不需要 250W 的人更聰明的選擇。24,000mAh 容量、主 USB-C 孔 140W PD 3.1、智慧螢幕顯示真實的輸入輸出瓦數、台幣三千五的價格已經穩定兩年。GaNPrime 內部設計實測比舊款 PowerCore 涼很多，電池循環壽命會更長。會排第二只是因為 Prime 250W 對筆電還有更多餘裕，不然這就是市面上每台幣容量最強的高端首選。

UGREEN Nexode 25,000mAh 200W 排第三，是 2026 年的 CP 值之王。台幣三千二給你 25,000mAh / 90Wh、單孔 140W 輸出、車規級 21700 鋰電芯、TFT 螢幕做到 Anker App 八成的功能但完全不用接手機。13 層安全保護是真材實料的工程設計，不是行銷話術。輸給 Anker Prime 只在 App 細膩度、輸給 737 只在機身大小。第一次買筆電級行動電源、又覺得 Anker 報價有點傷的人，就買它。

Anker Nano Power Bank（10K, 30W）排第四，毫無懸念拿下日常隨身組冠軍。內建的 USB-C 線同時當吊繩用，這是台幣 1500 以下行動電源裡最有誠意的工業設計。30W 足夠把 iPhone 17、iPad mini、或 M 系列 MacBook Air 快充到實用速度。10,000mAh 充兩支 iPhone 還有餘裕。台幣 1,490 是我會直接叫所有非技術背景朋友閉著眼買、別再糾結的那台。

Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2.2 排第五，是有 iPhone 16 或 17 又真的會用無線充電的人該選的。25W Qi2.2 是新的天花板，舊的 MagSafe 上限的兩倍，AM52 是少數通過這個速度認證的行動電源之一。內建 45W USB-C 線代表你可以一邊讓 iPhone 磁吸在背面充、一邊用線拉出來幫 iPad Air 滿速快充。16mm 機身真的塞得進口袋。會排第五而不是第三是因為 10,000mAh 的容量上限，iPhone 充一次半就要找牆插了。

Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 排第六，是 iPhone 12 到 15 用戶該選的那一台，因為 Qi2.2 25W 對你的手機沒用。15W Qi2 仍然是 iPhone 15 以下的硬體上限，不管你買什麼行動電源都一樣，MagGo 的折疊立架和 27W USB-C 有線輸出在線材這邊比 Belkin 更實用。ActiveShield 偵測是這代相對上一代真正的技術升級。台幣 1,990 比 Belkin 便宜將近一千，幾乎沒有任何損失。

Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Qi2 排第七，價格輸給 Anker MagGo，工業設計贏回來。彈出式立架比 Anker 的更穩，72% 回收外殼是磁吸品類裡最認真做環保的，七萬五千元的連接裝置保險是這個業界唯一我會信的保固。如果你看重立架第一、Belkin 名字在你公司 IT 部門有份量，就買它。

INIU 20,000mAh 45W 內建線版本排第八，是預算組裡真的會打破天花板的選擇。台幣 1,200 給你 20,000mAh、45W PD、內建 USB-C 線是史無前例的價格，TinyCell 電池技術讓機身比同容量 Anker 還小。會排第八不是第四是因為品牌長期支援紀錄較薄、沒有真正可用的智慧充電 App。如果你把行動電源當成比一頓晚餐還便宜的耗材在用，那這就是直接該買的版本。

Mophie Powerstation Pro XL 25K（100W）排第九，是 Apple 生態系用戶看重布面外殼、Find My 整合、Apple Store 高級體驗的人該選的。三個 USB-C 合計 100W 確實是筆電級輸出。會排第九不是第三是因為台幣四千八這個價格能買到 UGREEN Nexode 三千二就給你 200W 的版本。如果行動電源接 Find My 對你很重要就買，否則 UGREEN 才是理性選擇。

Zendure SuperTank Pro 26,800mAh 100W 排第十，是真的需要四個 USB-C 同時用的小眾選擇。USB-C 韌體更新這個功能在這個價位只有 Zendure 在做。2026 年六千四的定價讓 CP 值算不過去，因為 Anker Prime 250W 和 UGREEN Nexode 200W 都用更低價格給你更多總瓦數。除非你真的需要四台 USB-C 裝置從同一塊行動電源充電，不然挑兩孔但餘裕更多的對手才是對的。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W 是 2026 年只能挑一台時我會直接買的行動電源
highlights.body: 27,650mAh / 99.56Wh 剛好卡在美國 FAA 規定能上飛機的最高容量上限，250W PD 3.1 合計輸出能讓 16 吋 MacBook Pro 用滿載 140W 輸入快充，同時還能留 110W 給兩支手機。Anker App 加上找電源警報是這個品類最完整的智慧充電軟體。彩色螢幕顯示真實的輸入輸出瓦數，不是大多數行動電源亂掰的百分比。台幣五千八雖然比 737 貴，但解決的是不同的問題：這是唯一一台可以從機場板凳上同時餵飽筆電、兩支手機、平板的單一裝置。

highlights.title: PD 3.1 改變了筆電級行動電源的定義，只有三台真的跟上了
highlights.body: USB-C PD 3.1 在 2024 年底把單孔上限從 100W 拉到 240W，市場花了十八個月才真的做出超過 140W 的行動電源。Anker Prime 250W、Anker 737 140W、UGREEN Nexode 200W 是我會放心拿來給 16 吋 MacBook Pro 滿載快充的三台。2026 年還在標『100W max』的行動電源是這個市場已經不需要做的妥協。如果你打算花超過台幣兩千五買行動電源，答案就是這三台之一，否則數學算不過。

highlights.title: 內建 USB-C 線是 2026 年日常隨身的最低標準
highlights.body: Anker Nano 10K、INIU 20,000mAh、Baseus PicoGo 都是內建 USB-C 線設計，跟另外帶一條線的日常使用差距非常大。你直接消滅了「線忘在廚房檯面、包裡只剩一塊沒用的鋰電池磚頭」這個失敗模式。Anker Nano 還把線當吊繩用，這種真的有思考過的設計才值得品牌溢價。2026 年買沒有內建線的行動電源等於要你帶兩個配件做一個配件就能解決的事情。

highlights.title: Qi2.2 25W 只對 iPhone 16 和 17 有意義，其他 iPhone 都卡在 15W Qi2
highlights.body: Apple 是在手機端鎖無線充電速度，不是行動電源端鎖。iPhone 12 到 15 不管你接哪台 Qi2.2 行動電源都硬體上限 15W。只有 iPhone 16 和 17 才真的吃得到 Baseus PicoGo AM52 的 25W 天花板。如果你還在用 iPhone 15 或更舊，Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 台幣 1,990 給你跟台幣 2,500 的 Baseus 一模一樣的實際無線充電速度，省下的錢留著升級手機。買行動電源要對著手機規格買，不是對著規格表買。

highlights.title: 別買 USB-A 孔和 18,650 電芯的設計，那是上一代的東西
highlights.body: Amazon 上一千到兩千台幣的 18,650 圓柱電芯行動電源還是滿坑滿谷，自己回充很慢、給手機充也慢、瓦時數一樣的情況下機身比 21700 或軟包電芯大一截。USB-A 孔還活著只是為了相容舊線材，但現代手機、筆電、平板、AirPods 充電盒全部都吃 USB-C。2026 年買行動電源就要 21700 電芯、純 USB-C 輸出、支援 PD 3.1，不然你是用今年的價格買去年的產品。唯一例外是包裡的舊 USB-A 線真的還在用，那就忍 18 個月再換。

en.commentary: Travel and outdoor season buying intent is hitting peak and the 2026 portable charger ranking just got reshuffled at the top because Anker shipped the Prime 26K 300W in March and it pushes the category forward in three measurable ways. The Anker Prime 26K 300W takes first because dual 140W USB-C ports plus a USB-A combine for 300W total, the 250W bidirectional input recharges the brick from empty in under 50 minutes, and the new firmware adds native Xiaomi 120W HyperCharge and Huawei 66W SuperCharge support that no competitor matches. The Prime 27,650mAh 250W slides to second and remains the right buy for anyone who finds the 300W on sale below $160, since the 99.56Wh capacity is actually 0.19Wh higher and the smart display is identical. The Anker 737 PowerCore 24K holds third on the strength of 24,000mAh capacity and 140W output at the discounted $109 street price, making it the value pick for users who don't need dual-laptop output. The UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W stays fourth because price-to-capacity at $99 undercuts both Anker flagships while delivering 200W output that handles MacBook Pro charging adequately. The pattern in 2026 is that 100W or higher PD output has become table stakes for any portable charger pitched at laptop users, and 30W or lower legacy units have been pushed entirely into the impulse-buy phone-only segment. Memorial Day pricing on the new Anker Prime 300W is expected to drop toward $169 and that's the sharpest premium deal of the year.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26K 300W is the new category leader and earns the upgrade
highlights.body: 300W total output across dual 140W USB-C ports and a USB-A, 250W bidirectional input that refills the brick from empty in under 50 minutes, and native Xiaomi 120W HyperCharge plus Huawei 66W SuperCharge support that nothing else carries. At $199.99 it sits $20 above the 250W version and earns every dollar for anyone running a 16-inch MacBook Pro plus a phone plus a tablet from one brick on a long flight.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W is still the smart buy when discounted
highlights.body: 99.56Wh capacity, 250W combined output, and the same color display as the new 300W version make this the rational pick whenever Memorial Day or Prime Day pricing knocks it under $160. The 50W output gap rarely matters in real-world charging unless you are running two MacBook Pros simultaneously, and the older brick is identical for everything else.

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K is the value pick for laptop users
highlights.body: 24,000mAh capacity, 140W PD output that charges a MacBook Pro 14 at full speed, and the discounted $109 street price that undercuts most 100W competitors. For users who don't need 250W or 300W output, this is the smart spend.

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W is the value play in the high-output tier
highlights.body: Price-to-capacity at $99 undercuts comparable Anker options, 200W output handles MacBook Pro charging without compromise, and the build quality has finally caught up to the major brands. For users who want 200W output without paying premium pricing, this is the right pick.

zh-tw.commentary:
旅遊跟戶外季買氣衝高，2026 年行動電源排行最頂端剛剛重洗牌，因為 Anker 三月出貨的 Prime 26K 300W 把整個品類往前推了一段，而且推得很實在。第一名換成 Anker Prime 26K 300W，雙 140W USB-C 加 USB-A 合計 300W 總輸出，250W 雙向輸入讓這塊磚從空電到滿電不到 50 分鐘，新韌體還原生支援小米 120W HyperCharge 和華為 66W SuperCharge，這個小米華為協議相容沒有對手做到。

第二名退到 Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W，特價跌破台幣 5,200 還是該買，因為 99.56Wh 容量比新款還多 0.19Wh、彩色螢幕完全一樣。第三名 Anker 737 PowerCore 24K，24,000mAh 加 140W 輸出，街價 NT$3,500 是不需要雙筆電同時充的人的性價比之王。第四名 UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W，台幣三千二的容量價格比把兩款 Anker 旗艦都打下去，200W 對 MacBook Pro 充電完全夠用。

2026 年的脈絡是 100W 以上 PD 輸出變成筆電族行動電源的最低門檻，30W 以下傳統款被擠到純手機衝動購買區。Memorial Day 期間新的 Anker Prime 300W 通路會壓到台幣 5,500 上下，是今年高階段最划算的入手點。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26K 300W 是新王，升級值得
highlights.body: 雙 140W USB-C 加 USB-A 合計 300W 總輸出，250W 雙向輸入從空電到滿電不到 50 分鐘，原生支援小米 120W HyperCharge 和華為 66W SuperCharge 是市場上唯一一台。台幣 6,400 比 250W 版本貴台幣六百，長班機上 16 吋 MacBook Pro 加手機加平板從同一塊磚出力的人，這個錢花得很值得。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 27,650mAh 250W 特價時還是聰明的選擇
highlights.body: 99.56Wh 容量、250W 合計輸出、彩色螢幕跟新款 300W 完全一樣。Memorial Day 或 Prime Day 砍到台幣 5,200 以下就該買，那 50W 的輸出差距在不需要兩台 MacBook Pro 同時全速充電的情境根本感受不到，其他事情這塊舊磚都做得一模一樣。

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K 是筆電族性價比
highlights.body: 24,000mAh 容量、140W PD 輸出能讓 MacBook Pro 14 全速充電、街價 NT$3,500 比大部分 100W 對手便宜。不需要 250W 或 300W 輸出的使用者，這是聰明的選擇。

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W 是高輸出段性價比
highlights.body: 容量價格比 NT$3,200 比 Anker 同等級便宜，200W 輸出對 MacBook Pro 充電不妥協，做工終於追上大廠。想要 200W 輸出又不想付高階定價的使用者，這是正解。

en.commentary: Anker Prime Power Bank (26K, 300W) keeps first because the 300W output across three USB-C ports and the integrated display showing per-port wattage are still the spec combination no competitor has matched at this price tier. Anker's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Prime 26K at $169.99 (regular $199.99), which is the cheapest the Prime 26K has been since launch and which closes the value argument. Anker Prime Power Bank (27,650mAh, 250W) at second is the right answer for buyers who want maximum capacity slightly more than the 300W output. Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K, 140W) at third remains the airline-friendly value pick under TSA's 100Wh limit. UGREEN Nexode 145W at fourth is the dark horse, and the May 6 firmware update added the per-port priority configuration that finally makes UGREEN's mobile app actually useful. The 5/8 read is that Anker dominates the high-output portable charger market, the Prime 26K Memorial Day price locks first place, and the only real category news is UGREEN closing the software gap.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26K at $169.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Anker's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. 300W output across three USB-C ports plus the per-port wattage display at $170 closes the value argument decisively for any high-output portable charger buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K is still the airline-friendly value pick
highlights.body: 99.9Wh capacity stays under TSA's 100Wh limit while delivering 140W output, which is genuinely the best airline-friendly configuration for laptop-charging use cases. For frequent flyers who need a portable charger that works on every airline this is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 145W May 6 firmware update finally makes the app useful
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update added per-port priority configuration that lets users specify which port gets full power when capacity is constrained. This was the last open complaint about UGREEN's software, and the fix makes the Nexode 145W a credible value alternative to Anker.

zh-tw.commentary:
Anker Prime Power Bank (26K, 300W) 第一名守住，三孔 USB-C 300W 輸出加上每孔瓦數顯示的整合螢幕，這個規格組合在這個價位帶還是沒有對手做。Anker Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Prime 26K 殺到 $169.99（原 $199.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Anker Prime 26K NT$5,290 上下，幫 MacBook Pro 跟 iPad 同時充還能餘裕跑手機的這個用途，這台是目前最強。

第二名 Anker Prime Power Bank (27,650mAh, 250W) 是要容量再大一些勝過 300W 輸出的人首選。

第三名 Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K, 140W) 還是飛機可帶上機 100Wh 上限以下的性價比首選。

第四名 UGREEN Nexode 145W 是黑馬，5/6 韌體更新加上每孔優先順序配置，UGREEN App 終於真的好用。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，Anker 統治高功率移動電源市場，Prime 26K 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死第一，這週唯一品類新聞是 UGREEN 把軟體差距補起來。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26K $169.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Anker Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 年所有春季促銷。三孔 USB-C 300W 輸出加每孔瓦數顯示在 $170（約 NT$5,400）整個價值論述完全壓死，高功率行動電源買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K 還是飛機可帶性價比首選
highlights.body: 99.9Wh 容量在 TSA 100Wh 上限以下還能輸出 140W，是筆電充電用途裡飛機可帶最強配置。常出國差勤的人要一顆每家航空公司都能上機的行動電源，這顆是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 145W 5/6 韌體終於把 App 修好用
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新加上每孔優先順序配置，讓使用者指定容量受限時哪一孔吃滿功率。這是 UGREEN 軟體最後一個沒解的抱怨，修完之後 Nexode 145W 是 Anker 的可信性價比替代品。

references.title: Best Power Bank 2026: 5 New Chargers That Raised the Bar
Ugreen takes on Anker with wireless charging dock that powers 5 devices at once
UGREEN's 130W 20,000mAh 3-port USB-C power bank with smart display hits new all-time low at $57

en.commentary: Ugreen pushed the Nexode 25000mAh up against the Anker Prime hierarchy this week, and the value math is hard to ignore. The new street price puts it within 90 percent of the Anker Prime experience for substantially less, so I'm bumping it a tenth on the overall score by raising the value factor. The Anker Prime 26k 300W and Prime 27650 250W stay top because the ActiveShield 4.0 thermal management and PowerIQ 4.0 dynamic allocation hold up under sustained load in ways the Ugreen still can't quite match, and the dual-port input recharge times are genuinely class-leading. The Anker 737 stays the safe travel pick because the airline-friendly 24,000mAh capacity and 140W output cover MacBook Pro, iPad, and phone in one chassis without TSA worries. The Nano Power Bank 10K, Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2, and Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 hold the wireless-portable tier with stable rankings, the Baseus Qi 2.2 implementation continues to surprise reviewers and the price-to-features ratio remains the best in this segment. The Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Qi2 is the boring safe choice for people who only buy from major-name brands. The INIU 20000mAh with built-in cable is the budget winner for people who don't want a wallet companion app. Mophie Powerstation Pro XL and Zendure Supertank Pro feel a generation behind on smart features and value, only buy on aggressive discount.

highlights.title: Ugreen Nexode 25000mAh closes the gap to Anker Prime
highlights.body: 200W output across three ports plus 140W single-port via PD 3.1 lands close to Prime tier capability at street prices well below Anker. Value bump warranted.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26k 300W still owns the throne
highlights.body: ActiveShield 4.0 thermal management and dual-port 250W input recharge is genuinely class-leading. The premium tier hasn't been threatened, only crowded.

highlights.title: Anker 737 24K is the travel safe bet
highlights.body: Airline-friendly capacity, 140W output that handles MacBook Pro, and Anker's reliability track record. Boring is good when you fly.

highlights.title: Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2 quietly wins mid-tier wireless
highlights.body: Qi 2.2 implementation tested better than Anker MagGo at most reviewer benches. Price-to-features ratio is the best in the segment.

highlights.title: INIU built-in cable is budget winner
highlights.body: 20,000mAh and 45W with built-in USB-C cable. No companion app, no premium price, just charging that works.

zh-tw.commentary: Ugreen 這禮拜把 Nexode 25000mAh 直接打到 Anker Prime 旗艦行列旁邊，性價比真的很難無視。市售街價拉低之後，差不多用九成 Anker Prime 體驗換顯著低的價錢，所以我這次把它的性價比分往上調，整體分數也跟著加一點。Anker Prime 26k 300W 跟 Prime 27650 250W 還是穩坐前兩名，ActiveShield 4.0 散熱跟 PowerIQ 4.0 動態分配在長時間滿載運作下還是 Ugreen 追不太上的地方，雙口輸入回充速度真的同級無敵。Anker 737 還是出國首選，24,000mAh 過得了航空安檢加 140W 輸出，MacBook Pro、iPad、手機一台搞定。Nano Power Bank 10K、Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2 跟 Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 守無線可攜這個級距排名沒動，Baseus 的 Qi 2.2 實作評測一直加分，這個價位帶找不到更好的功能組合。Belkin BoostCharge Pro 10K Qi2 是給只買大牌的人，無聊但安全。INIU 20000mAh 內建線是不想下載 App 的入門首選。Mophie Powerstation Pro XL 跟 Zendure Supertank Pro 智慧功能跟性價比真的老一輪，沒有狠折扣不要買。

highlights.title: Ugreen Nexode 25000mAh 拉近 Anker Prime 距離
highlights.body: 200W 三口輸出加 PD 3.1 單口 140W，已經接近 Prime 級距能力。市售價遠低於 Anker，性價比給加分名正言順。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26k 300W 還是王座
highlights.body: ActiveShield 4.0 散熱加雙口 250W 輸入回充就是同級沒對手。高階區塊還沒被威脅，只是變熱鬧而已。

highlights.title: Anker 737 24K 出國最穩
highlights.body: 過得了安檢的容量加 140W 餵 MacBook Pro，Anker 故障率紀錄擺在那。出差搭飛機就買它，無聊就是好。

highlights.title: Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi2 中階無線冷門王
highlights.body: Qi 2.2 實測比 Anker MagGo 還好。同價位帶功能配置目前無人能敵。

highlights.title: INIU 內建線款是入門首選
highlights.body: 20,000mAh 加 45W 加內建 USB-C 線。沒有 App 沒有溢價，就是好用的充電器。

en.commentary: Portable charger rankings hold this weekend. Anker Prime 26K 300W stays at number one because the 300W output, the dual USB-C PD3.1 ports, and the smart display together make this the only power bank I would recommend to a buyer who powers a laptop plus phones plus accessories simultaneously. Anker Prime 27650 250W takes second because the high-capacity 27650 mAh in a still-portable form factor solves the multi-day travel use case better than any single-port competitor. Anker 737 PowerCore 24K rounds out the top three on the value-flagship intersection at the under-one-fifty price point. The mid-tier slate is unchanged with the Anker MagGo 10K for MagSafe-compatible iPhone buyers, the Mophie Powerstation Plus XL for buyers who want integrated cables, and the Zendure SuperTank 3 for the highest-capacity option for international travelers. Mother's Day weekend buy advice: laptop-plus-everything power buyers go Prime 26K 300W, multi-day travel buyers go Prime 27650, MagSafe iPhone buyers go MagGo 10K. The category has matured enough that Anker dominates the right answer for most use cases.

highlights.title: Prime 26K 300W is the laptop-plus-everything default
highlights.body: 300W output plus dual USB-C PD3.1 plus smart display. Right pick when you power laptop plus accessories.

highlights.title: Prime 27650 wins multi-day travel
highlights.body: 27650 mAh in portable form factor. Right pick for travelers who need multiple full charges between outlets.

highlights.title: MagGo 10K is the MagSafe answer
highlights.body: Right pick for MagSafe-compatible iPhone households who want wireless charging without cables.

highlights.title: PowerCore 24K is the value-flagship pick
highlights.body: Right pick at sub-one-fifty pricing when you want flagship-tier features without absolute top pricing.

highlights.title: Anker dominates the category
highlights.body: Most use cases have an Anker right answer. Other brands fill specific niches but Anker is the safe default.

zh-tw.commentary: 行動電源排名這週不動。Anker Prime 26K 300W 守第一，300W 輸出、雙 USB-C PD3.1 埠、智慧顯示，這個組合是同時要供電給筆電加手機加配件的買家唯一推薦。Anker Prime 27650 250W 第二，高容量 27650 mAh 在還算可攜的體積，多日旅行需求比任何單埠對手都解得好。Anker 737 PowerCore 24K 第三是台幣四千五以下的價值旗艦交集。中段沒變，Anker MagGo 10K 給 MagSafe iPhone 買家、Mophie Powerstation Plus XL 給想要整合線材的、Zendure SuperTank 3 給國際旅行需要最大容量的。母親節週末建議：筆電加什麼都要供電買 Prime 26K 300W，多日旅行買 Prime 27650，MagSafe iPhone 買 MagGo 10K。這個品類成熟到 Anker 在大部分用途都是正解。台灣搭飛機帶上機行動電源容量限制是 27000 mAh 以下，超過要託運要注意。

highlights.title: Prime 26K 300W 筆電加全部首選
highlights.body: 300W 加雙 USB-C PD3.1 加智慧顯示，筆電加配件就買它。

highlights.title: Prime 27650 多日旅行王
highlights.body: 27650 mAh 可攜體積，多日旅行多次完整充電就選它。

highlights.title: MagGo 10K MagSafe 解答
highlights.body: MagSafe iPhone 想要無線充電的買它。

highlights.title: PowerCore 24K 價值旗艦
highlights.body: 台幣四千五以下要旗艦功能不要絕對頂價選它。

highlights.title: Anker 主導品類
highlights.body: 大部分用途都有 Anker 解答，其他品牌補利基。

en.commentary:
Sunday refresh on the portable charger board and the rankings hold across the entire slate. Anker Prime 26K 300W keeps the top spot because the 300W output, the dual USB-C PD3.1 ports, and the smart display combination remain the only complete answer for a buyer who powers a laptop plus phones plus accessories at the same time. Anker Prime 27650 250W stays at second on the multi-day travel use case where 27650 mAh in a still-portable form factor delivers the most charges per battery cycle in the category. Anker 737 PowerCore 24K holds third at the value-flagship intersection just under $150.

UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W ties for fourth on capacity-per-dollar, where the smart display and 200W output deliver the best raw value for buyers who want flagship features at $89. Anker Nano Power Bank 10K stays at five for everyday phone topping. Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi22 at six is the wireless travel pick. Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 at seven owns the MagSafe iPhone slot. Belkin BoostCharge Pro at eight is the Qi2 alternative. INIU 20000mAh with built-in cable at nine is the budget high-capacity pick. Mophie Powerstation Pro XL at ten and Zendure SuperTank Pro at eleven round out the high-capacity tier.

Mother's Day weekend buy advice: laptop-plus-everything buyers go Prime 26K 300W, multi-day travel buyers go Prime 27650, MagSafe iPhone buyers go MagGo 10K. The category has matured enough that Anker delivers the right answer for most use cases, and the UGREEN at four is the right call when raw value-per-dollar matters most. TSA limits remain at 27000 mAh and most of the top slate fits inside that ceiling.

highlights.title: Prime 26K 300W is the laptop-plus-everything default
highlights.body: 300W output plus dual USB-C PD3.1 plus smart display. The right pick when you power laptop, phones, and accessories at the same time.

highlights.title: Prime 27650 wins multi-day travel
highlights.body: 27650 mAh in a portable form factor delivers the most charges per battery cycle. Right pick for travelers who need multiple full charges between outlets.

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 200W is the value flagship at $89
highlights.body: 200W output plus smart display at the entry flagship price tier. Right pick when raw value-per-dollar matters most.

highlights.title: MagGo 10K is the MagSafe answer
highlights.body: Right pick for MagSafe-compatible iPhone households who want wireless charging without cables.

highlights.title: Anker dominates the category
highlights.body: Most use cases have an Anker right answer. Other brands fill specific niches and the UGREEN is the value alternative at four.

zh-tw.commentary:
週日再盤一次行動電源榜，全榜排名維持。Anker Prime 26K 300W 第一名守住，300W 輸出、雙 USB-C PD3.1 埠、智慧顯示這個組合，對同時要供電給筆電加手機加配件的買家還是唯一完整答案。Anker Prime 27650 250W 第二，27650 mAh 在還算可攜的體積，多日旅行單顆能充最多次。Anker 737 PowerCore 24K 第三，台幣四千五以下的價值旗艦交集。

UGREEN Nexode 25000mAh 200W 並列第四，容量價格比最高，台幣兩千八出頭就有智慧顯示加 200W 輸出，想要旗艦功能但 CP 值優先選它。Anker Nano Power Bank 10K 第五是日常手機補電。Baseus PicoGo AM52 Qi22 第六是無線旅行首選。Anker MagGo 10K Qi2 第七守住 MagSafe iPhone 位置。Belkin BoostCharge Pro 第八是 Qi2 替代方案。INIU 20000mAh 內建線第九是大容量平價首選。Mophie Powerstation Pro XL 第十、Zendure SuperTank Pro 第十一收尾大容量機種。

母親節週末建議：筆電加全部買 Prime 26K 300W，多日旅行買 Prime 27650，MagSafe iPhone 買 MagGo 10K。這個品類成熟到 Anker 在大部分用途都是正解，UGREEN 第四是純 CP 值首選。台灣搭飛機帶上機限制是 27000 mAh 以下，前面排名大部分都在這個範圍內，超過要託運要注意。

highlights.title: Prime 26K 300W 筆電加全部首選
highlights.body: 300W 加雙 USB-C PD3.1 加智慧顯示，筆電加手機加配件就買它。

highlights.title: Prime 27650 多日旅行王
highlights.body: 27650 mAh 可攜體積，單顆能充最多次，多日旅行就選它。

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 200W 台幣兩千八價值旗艦
highlights.body: 200W 加智慧顯示在入門旗艦價位，CP 值優先選它。

highlights.title: MagGo 10K MagSafe 答案
highlights.body: MagSafe iPhone 想要無線充電就買它。

highlights.title: Anker 主導品類
highlights.body: 大部分用途都有 Anker 解答，UGREEN 第四是 CP 值替代方案。
